summary: iOS 🟥 ANC | Settings for Transparency mode are not properly applied/saved
scenario: Transparency mode sub-settings (Environment/Speech) are not saved and revert to defaults when reopening the settings page.
description_clean: Transparency mode settings (Environment/Speech) are not properly applied or saved. When switching between Environment and Speech sub-settings for Transparency mode and reopening the settings page, the device reverts to a default (Surround 85 reverts to Speech; Free 60 and Free 20 revert to Environment) instead of saving the user's selection.
steps: Switch to Speech sub-setting (e.g., Free 60 or Free 20).
Reopen the Transparency mode settings page.
expected: The previously selected sub-setting (e.g., Surround 85 or Free 60/Free 20) should be saved and displayed upon reopening.
actual: The device reverts to a default: Surround 85 reverts to Speech; Free 60 and Free 20 revert to Environment.
